name: Ubiquiti UISP Box Plus
title: Ubiquiti UISP Box Plus
short_description: The UISP Box Plus stands as a robust enclosure specifically designed to safeguard the UISP® Switch Plus from the elements and potential physical damage. This enclosure boasts an IPX6-rated water resistance, ensuring protection against harsh weather conditions.
description: The UISP Box Plus stands as a robust enclosure specifically designed to safeguard the UISP® Switch Plus from the elements and potential physical damage. This enclosure boasts an IPX6-rated water resistance, ensuring protection against harsh weather conditions. Its mounting versatility allows for seamless installation either on a pole or directly on a wall, catering to diverse deployment scenarios. The supported pole diameter ranges from 35 to 60 mm, accommodating a wide range of installation options. To further enhance the protection of the UISP® Switch Plus, the UISP Box Plus includes a Fiber Strain Relief Kit. This kit provides comprehensive protection against the strain and stress that can be exerted on the fiber optic cables that connect the switch to other devices. By utilizing the Fiber Strain Relief Kit, the UISP Box Plus ensures the integrity and reliability of the network infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Durability and Protection
detailed_description.text: The UISP Box Plus stands as a robust enclosure specifically designed to safeguard the UISP® Switch Plus from the elements and potential physical damage. This enclosure boasts an IPX6-rated water resistance, ensuring protection against harsh weather conditions. Its mounting versatility allows for seamless installation either on a pole or directly on a wall, catering to diverse deployment scenarios. The supported pole diameter ranges from 35 to 60 mm, accommodating a wide range of installation options.

detailed_description.heading: Note
detailed_description.text: Note! Power TransPort™ Cable required for operation (sold separately).

detailed_description.text: To further enhance the protection of the UISP® Switch Plus, the UISP Box Plus includes a Fiber Strain Relief Kit. This kit provides comprehensive protection against the strain and stress that can be exerted on the fiber optic cables that connect the switch to other devices. By utilizing the Fiber Strain Relief Kit, the UISP Box Plus ensures the integrity and reliability of the network infrastructure.
